name: Aria, The Halloween Surprise.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)** Netori Warning.

You're a Pizza Driver and you get quite a big surprise from a lonely housewife.

Yeah, Yeah, Out of Season, Off my 3 Months whatever.

(The Woman is so large that it makes the little guy in the image look small. Simple Size Difference, nothing else.)

(Art by StrangeHero)

Edit 2/13/25: Changed Image to Remove Nudity. it's low quality since it has to be REALLY small for it to fit.
creator: wisperrr
